pr.title: Record: 1.0722 BPB — Improved TTT + HedgeMixer with Per-Layer LR Groups

output.summary: TTT adaptation now uses per-layer LR groups, cosine annealing, four epochs, and fewer frozen blocks to better target output projections.
techniques: Per-layer LR multipliers emphasizing adaptation of output projections
Cosine LR decay plus four TTT epochs with only one frozen block
Reused TTT eval to drop standalone sliding-window passes
